title: The People of al-Bahrayn, the Apostasy of al-Hutam, and Those Who Joined With Him in al-Bahrayn
description: The People of al-Bahrayn, the Apostasy of al-Hutam, and Those Who Joined With Him in al-Bahrayn. Recorded under the year 11 AH (c. 632 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 10.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 10
